name: Rajasthan Tour with Khajuraho & Varanasi
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, Khajuraho, Varanasi with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representatives assist you and transfer
itinerary.description: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representatives assist you and transfer to the hotel after refresh proceed a guided tour to visit Red fort, Jama masjid, India gate, President house, Lotus temple, overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Jaipur ( 260 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Jaipur ( 260 Kms. 6 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast proceed to Pink city Jaipur. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit Amer Fort, Jal Mahal ( water palac
itinerary.description: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit Amer Fort, Jal Mahal ( water palace), Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory(Jantar Mantar). Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Agra (260 Kms
itinerary.description: Jaipur to Agra (260 Kms. 6 Hrs. approx.): VIA Fatehpur Sikri, Today after breakfast proceed to Agra and stop for visiting  Fatehpur Sikri. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit The Taj Mahal, Agra Fort
itinerary.description: Today after breakfast, a guided tour to visit The Taj Mahal, Agra Fort. Rest of the day at leisure .

itinerary.title: Agra  – Khajuraho (410 Kms
itinerary.description: Agra  – Khajuraho (410 Kms. 6/7 Hrs. approx.): Today after breakfast proceed to Khajuraho En-Route to visit Orchha (Temple Town ). Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast, proceed to sightseeing and visit Western Temples and Jain
itinerary.description: Today after breakfast, proceed to sightseeing and visit Western Temples and Jain Temples. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Khajuraho – Varanasi (400 Kms
itinerary.description: Khajuraho – Varanasi (400 Kms. 8/9 Hrs. approx.), Today after breakfast proceed to Varanasi. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Today early morning boat ride excursion on the holly river Ganges to see the fam
itinerary.description: Today early morning boat ride excursion on the holly river Ganges to see the famous bathing Ghats and cremation site, back to hotel and after breakfast, a guided tour to visit Vishweshwar temple, Bharat Mata Temple and Sarnath  & Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast in the morning, proceed to drop you at  Varanasi Airport/R
itinerary.description:
Today after breakfast in the morning, proceed to drop you at  Varanasi Airport/Railway station to board a flight for your onward journey.
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Breakfast
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel, State taxes
Comfortable vehicle with experienced driver
City tour guide English guide: Delhi, Agra,
